verses.1: The LORD reigns, may the earth rejoice; May the many islands be joyful.
verses.2: Clouds and thick darkness surround Him; Righteousness and justice are the foundation of His throne.
verses.3: Fire goes before Him And burns up His enemies all around.
verses.4: His lightning lit up the world; The earth saw it and trembled.
verses.5: The mountains melted like wax at the presence of the LORD, At the presence of the Lord of the whole earth.
verses.6: The heavens declare His righteousness, And all the peoples have seen His glory.
verses.7: May all those be ashamed who serve carved images, Who boast in idols; Worship Him, all you gods.
verses.8: Zion heard this and was joyful, And the daughters of Judah have rejoiced Because of Your judgments, LORD.
verses.9: For You are the LORD Most High over all the earth; You are exalted far above all gods.
verses.10: Hate evil, you who love the LORD, Who watches over the souls of His godly ones; He saves them from the hand of the wicked.
verses.11: Light is sown like seed for the righteous, And gladness for the upright in heart.
verses.12: Be joyful in the LORD, you righteous ones, And praise the mention of His holy name.
